arts.ttl: Premier League release statement on Jhon Duran's 'dreadful' red card at Newcastle
arts.sum: Aston Villa were left with just 10 men on the field against Newcastle after Jhon Duran was sent off after stamping on Fabian Schar in the Premier League clash at St James' Park

arts.ttl: Tino Livramento's Newcastle United absence explained as Kieran Trippier returns
arts.sum: Newcastle United handed Kieran Trippier his first start since October in the Magpies' clash against Aston Villa. The other change from the side that won 4-0 at Ipswich on Saturday was a Joelinton return from suspension with the Brazilian replacing Joe Willock.

arts.ttl: Tottenham, Newcastle and Aston Villa encouraged for signing – Club lower price after blocking PL trio’s summer approach
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur, Newcastle United and Aston Villa have been linked with Fiorentina’s Michael Kayode in the past. While Aston Villa had a low offer rejected in the summer transfer window, the other clubs were encouraged to move for the Italian, who has played only five times in the Serie A this season. arts.ttl: Arsenal could be option for potential Bukayo Saka replacement – Gunners need to be wary of Aston Villa
arts.sum: Last week, Aston Villa had emerged as a suitor for AC Milan’s Samuel Chukwueze. It now seems as if Arsenal could also become a potential destination for the Nigerian. This comes from MilanLive, who assess the winger’s situation and they believe that Arsenal is the most ‘interesting option’ for the 25-year-old. arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Aston Villa LIVE match updates and team news
arts.sum: Newcastle are unbeaten in their last 15 Premier League home games against Villa and have won the last three in a row by an aggregate score of 10-1. Villa have lost on Boxing Day in each of the last three seasons, conceding three goals in each defeat.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United missing four players for Aston Villa clash in Boxing Day blow
arts.sum: Eddie Howe could have two huge additions to his squad for the Boxing Day clash with Aston Villa - and it comes at the perfect time for the Newcastle United head coach. Join our Aston Villa WhatsApp group and get the latest breaking news, interviews and opinion sent straight to your phone, plus matchday team news and live updates of all the action.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer and Chris Sutton agree on Newcastle vs Villa prediction with 'ruthless' verdict
arts.sum: "Aston Villa had hit a bit of form again and they were brilliant against Man City, three points would set up Newcastle well going into that match at Old Trafford next week," Shearer told Betfair. Newcastle United have hit form at an important time, but know Aston Villa will be a tough test of their credentials this afternoon.

arts.ttl: Newcastle ‘very, very interested’ in Lens’ Abdukodir Khusanov
arts.sum: Abdukodir Khusanov (20) looks increasingly likely to leave RC Lens in January. The centre-back has impressed since asserting himself as a first-team regular at the start of the season, however,…

arts.ttl: Player ‘welcomes’ Newcastle United exit in January – Direct contact with Magpies
arts.sum: Botafogo have emerged as a new contender to sign Newcastle United’s Miguel Almirón in the winter market. That’s according to Globo Esporte, who state the Brazilian club are willing to offer the 30-year-old an escape route from Newcastle. arts.ttl: Aston Villa player can be ‘symbolic signing’ in January – House already ready
arts.sum: Aston Villa goalkeeper Robin Olsen has been linked with a move back to Malmö FF in the winter market. Two months ago, we covered claims from Sweden which stated Malmö are making a firm attempt to secure the 34-year-old’s services.
